name: Tropical Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 small Yellow onion, cut into rings
3 Stalks Hearts of palm, cut into 1/2 inch rings
1/3 cup Diced sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Brush a large baking dish with 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
3. Place green beans, onion, and garlic in the dish.
4. Drizzle with remaining oil and sprinkle with salt.
5. Bake for 25 minutes, stirring beans at least three times.
6. When tender, remove beans from oven and transfer to a bowl.
7. Immediately drizzle with vinegar.
8. Add hearts of palm, tomatoes, pine nuts, and pepper to taste and toss.
